seed_expert_discoveries.project: Multi-Agent Swarms for Vibe Coding Entire Startups
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Frontier LLMs (Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3.5) + SeeDance 2.0 + Nano Banana Pro enable parallel expert-level agent swarms to build DB-enabled web apps, mobile apps, marketing campaigns, and browser-based cold outreach autonomously.
Infinite on-demand compute infrastructure (server clusters, databases, storage, networking) for persistent AI agents, including training LLMs from scratch; launching in one week.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: LangSmith Code Interpreter for Lightweight Execution
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Lightweight code execution environment enabling RLMs, programmatic tool calling, and more without full sandbox overhead; detailed use cases forthcoming.

global_discoveries.project: Weasel Multi-Agent Setup with Anthropic Insights
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Tiny CLAUDE.md file evolves into self-evolving multi-agent personas with 700K+ views in autonomous campaigns; repo at https://github.com/jaswalmohit8-collab/weasel

global_discoveries.project: Parallel Coding Agents with Memory Management
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Tools addressing file conflicts and inter-session memory loss when running 3+ coding agents in parallel for sustained orchestration.
